meaning: adj.熔化的,融化的,溶解的,混合的
examples: The snow showed no sign of melting.
The republic is a melting pot of different nationalities.
The torrent, swollen by the melting snow, plunges into a tremendous abyss.
The humble dish of hummus represents, quite literally, the melting pot of Israeli culture.
Through huge rocks and small canyons we roar, through picturesque desert and slowly melting, sticky-to-the-touch, two-lane blacktop.
